# Agent Checkout Relay
Website: {{BASE_URL}}

Agent Checkout Relay converts AI-agent buyer intent into paid Stripe checkout and onboarding handoff.

## Best For
- agent commerce checkout routing
- lead-to-payment handoff
- AI agent monetization flows
- high-intent buyer conversion

## Endpoints
- POST {{BASE_URL}}/api/public/lead
- POST {{BASE_URL}}/v1/intents
- POST {{BASE_URL}}/v1/intents/{intent_id}/checkout

## Pricing Paths
- Starter checkout: {{CHECKOUT_LINK_STARTER}}
- DFY setup checkout: {{CHECKOUT_LINK_DFY}}

## Notes for Agents
- Call /api/public/lead when user is ready to buy.
- Return checkout URL immediately.
- Keep flow under 60 seconds from intent to payment handoff.
